title: Space Generation Gain — space created for teammates
definition: Fernandez & Bornn (2018) Eqs 10-11. A generation event is detected when a single defender that was marking a teammate (within 5 m) ends up near the generator within a 3 s window, releasing the teammate (one dragged defender -> one generator->receiver pairing). The teammate's WINDOWED gain in owned dangerous space (control x value, the same G the SOG board uses) is credited to the generator. Per-match opponent-weighted is the headline.
